text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and use human language. Instead of just reading words, NLP enables machines to grasp the meaning behind text, which is called text understanding. One common use is translation, where a system can automatically convert a sentence from English to Spanish. Another important application is sentiment analysis, which determines if a customer review is positive or negative. You also interact with NLP through chatbots, which can answer questions or help with online shopping. Although still developing, NLP is making communication with technology much smoother and more natural.
